text:
internet.password

Generates a random password-like string. Do not use this method for generating actual passwords for users.

Schema: awd.domain.internet.password()

Parameter Details
Name	Details
length	The length of the password to generate. Example: 12
memorable	Whether the generated password should be memorable. Example: true
pattern	The pattern that all chars should match. This option will be ignored, if memorable is true. Example: [A-Z]
prefix	The prefix to use. Example: #
Parameter Types
Name	Type	Req
length	integer	optional
memorable	boolean	optional
pattern	regexp	optional
prefix	string	optional
Usage Examples

Shows internet.password with all optional params omitted.

Command: internet.password

Params field: Leave blank

Full call: internet.password()

Returns: He2AFTHb4tHV3mb

Shows internet.password using only a custom length.

Command: internet.password

Params field: (length=12)

Full call: internet.password(length=12)

Returns: He2AFTHb4tHV

Shows internet.password using only the memorable flag.

Command: internet.password

Params field: (memorable=true)

Full call: internet.password(memorable=true)

Returns: hefutisawetikub

Shows internet.password generating a memorable password-like string.

Command: internet.password

Params field: (length=12, memorable=true)

Full call: internet.password(length=12, memorable=true)

Returns: hefutisaweti

Shows internet.password constrained only by a regex-style pattern.

Command: internet.password

Params field: (pattern="[A-Z]")

Full call: internet.password(pattern="[A-Z]")

Returns: HAFTHHVISKOWXHH

Shows internet.password constrained by a regex-style pattern.

Command: internet.password

Params field: (length=12, memorable=false, pattern="[A-Z]")

Full call: internet.password(length=12, memorable=false, pattern="[A-Z]")

Returns: HAFTHHVISKOW

Shows internet.password using only the prefix option.

Command: internet.password

Params field: (prefix="#")

Full call: internet.password(prefix="#")

Returns: #He2AFTHb4tHV3m

Shows internet.password using length, pattern, and prefix together.

Command: internet.password

Params field: (length=12, memorable=false, pattern="[A-Z]", prefix="#")

Full call: internet.password(length=12, memorable=false, pattern="[A-Z]", prefix="#")

Returns: #HAFTHHVISKO

helpers.arrayElement

Returns one random element from the supplied array.

Schema: faker.helpers.arrayElement()

Parameter Details
Name	Details
array	Array of candidate values to choose from.
Parameter Types
Name	Type	Req
array	array	required
Usage Examples

Shows helpers.arrayElement in use.

Command: helpers.arrayElement

Params field: (["A", "B", "C"])

Full call: helpers.arrayElement(["A", "B", "C"])

Returns: B
